infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Allow Framing Assistant to access your photos so you can place artwork into the preview.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Allow Framing Assistant to use the camera so you can capture artwork for the preview.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Framing Assistant to access your photos so you can place artwork into the preview.
plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Framing Assistant to use the camera so you can capture artwork for the preview.
